## Problem Statement

Household meal planning is collaborative and needs shared ownership without friction.

## Functional Requirements

- Multiple contributors (spouse, grandparents, caregivers)
- Weekly and daily views
- Add, edit, replace meals
- Track who last made changes

## Acceptance Criteria

- Changes sync in real time
- Edit history is visible
- Undo is available

## Jenya Impact

Reduces mental load by making meal planning shared and reliable.
